requirement_topic.en: EVSE Safety Baseline — UL 2202 / UL 2594 and IEC 61851 References

summary.en: Belize's national standards body is the Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS), while electricity service and utility interfaces are handled through PUC oversight and BEL project coordination. For EVSE in a US-heritage 60 Hz market, safety evidence should be prepared around UL 2594 for AC EVSE and UL 2202 for DC charging equipment where requested by the importer, site owner, insurer, utility, or tender. IEC 61851 can remain a useful international reference for conductive charging safety, but UL-direction evidence is the more practical baseline for a J1772 / CCS1, 60 Hz Americas deployment.
summary.zh: 伯利兹国家标准机构为Belize Bureau of Standards（BBS），电力服务和公用事业接口则通过PUC监管及BEL项目协调处理。对于美国体系60 Hz市场的EVSE，如进口商、场地方、保险方、公用事业公司或招标文件提出要求，安全证据应围绕交流EVSE的UL 2594和直流充电设备的UL 2202准备。IEC 61851仍可作为传导充电安全的有用国际参考，但对于J1772 / CCS1、60 Hz美洲部署，UL方向证据是更实际的基线。
summary.zht: 貝里斯國家標準機構為Belize Bureau of Standards（BBS），電力服務和公用事業接口則通過PUC監管及BEL項目協調處理。對於美國體系60 Hz市場的EVSE，如進口商、場地方、保險方、公用事業公司或招標文件提出要求，安全證據應圍繞交流EVSE的UL 2594和直流充電設備的UL 2202準備。IEC 61851仍可作為傳導充電安全的有用國際參考，但對於J1772 / CCS1、60 Hz美洲部署，UL方向證據是更實際的基線。

standards_or_laws: Belize Bureau of Standards (BBS) standards and conformity-assessment context
UL 2202 — Electric Vehicle Charging System Equipment
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China's comparable design baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for EV conductive charging system general requirements, combined with GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 DC communication. GB/T 18487 evidence may help explain the domestic design, but it does not prove conformity to UL 2594, UL 2202, SAE J1772, CCS1, or project-specific Belize requirements.
summary.zh: 中国可比设计基线为电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求GB/T 18487.1-2023，并结合GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930直流通信。GB/T 18487证据可用于说明国内设计，但不能证明符合UL 2594、UL 2202、SAE J1772、CCS1或伯利兹项目特定要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比設計基線為電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求GB/T 18487.1-2023，並結合GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930直流通訊。GB/T 18487證據可用於說明國內設計，但不能證明符合UL 2594、UL 2202、SAE J1772、CCS1或貝里斯項目特定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare a clause-level safety matrix for UL 2594 or UL 2202 as applicable, 60 Hz leakage-current and protection-device evidence, ground-fault protection evidence, enclosure ingress and corrosion suitability for Belize's humid coastal environment, temperature-rise testing at the Belize voltage class, and installation instructions aligned with BEL site requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough for a Belize-facing J1772 / CCS1 charger package.
gap.zh: 出口商应按适用情况准备UL 2594或UL 2202逐条安全矩阵、60 Hz漏电流和保护器件证据、接地故障保护证据、适合伯利兹潮湿沿海环境的外壳防护和耐腐蚀证据、伯利兹电压等级下的温升测试，以及符合BEL场地要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487报告不足以构成面向伯利兹的J1772 / CCS1充电桩资料包。
gap.zht: 出口商應按適用情況準備UL 2594或UL 2202逐條安全矩陣、60 Hz漏電流和保護器件證據、接地故障保護證據、適合貝里斯潮濕沿海環境的外殼防護和耐腐蝕證據、貝里斯電壓等級下的溫升測試，以及符合BEL場地要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487報告不足以構成面向貝里斯的J1772 / CCS1充電樁資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but high practical importance — BBS, importer, insurer, BEL, tender, or site owner may require UL-direction or IEC safety evidence; confirm the accepted route before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not a UL 2594 / UL 2202 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a China design baseline only. A Belize package should be rebuilt around 60 Hz, SAE J1772 / CCS1, and UL 2594 / UL 2202 or project-accepted IEC 61851 evidence, with BEL installation documentation handled separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023视为中国设计基线。伯利兹资料包应围绕60 Hz、SAE J1772 / CCS1，以及UL 2594 / UL 2202或项目接受的IEC 61851证据重新构建，并单独处理BEL安装文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023視為中國設計基線。貝里斯資料包應圍繞60 Hz、SAE J1772 / CCS1，以及UL 2594 / UL 2202或項目接受的IEC 61851證據重新構建，並單獨處理BEL安裝文件。
